action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy is 21.32% with CLIP ViT-B/16 + SWAD. Previous iteration had JSON parsing error. Analysis: Need to try a fundamentally different approach - DINOv2 has different inductive biases (self-supervised vs CLIP's vision-language), and ensembling diverse models should improve OOD generalization. Edge augmentation bridges the domain gap to Quickdraw's sketch style. Decision: Train DINOv2 ViT-B/14 with SWAD + edge augmentation, then ensemble with existing CLIP model.
